productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Navy Blue Jacket
description: Composition Navy blue puffer jacket with the shell and lining made of 100% polyester, has full sleeves, a mock collar, a concealed zippered front placket, two pockets with press button closures, and stitch detailing Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade Jacket from united colors of benetton for women. This jacket is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and ankle high boots. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
